result.stdout:
Bbob help:
Command 'add': Add the theme or plugin. Auto detect.
<option>:
--address | -a : Add from address. <content> is address.
--file | -f : Add from local path. <content> is local file path.
--list | -l : Add from list file `addlist.txt` in current path.
--global | -g : Add <content> to global directory.
--replace | -r : Replace <content> no overwrite.

Use:
// add <option> [content]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'new': Create the blog. Default create blog.
[option]:
--blog | -b : create article.

Use:
// new [option] [blogName]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'deploy': Deploy the blog.
Use:
// deploy
// d

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'dev': Generate files for development.
Use:
// dev

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'enable/disable': Enable/Disable the plugin. If <pluginName> is '*b' corresponding all build-in plugin, '*t' corresponding all third plugin, if will not affect original disable config.
[option]:
-d : direct enable or disable plugin.

Use:
// enable [option] <pluginName>
// disable [option] <pluginName>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'generate': Generate the blog to distribution (folder name 'dist').
[option]:
--deploy | -d : Deploy the blog after generation.
--preview | -p : Preview the blog after generation.

Use:
// generate [option]
// g [option]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'init': Initialize the blog. No do anything. To use Bbob must initialize first.
Use:
// init
// i

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'list': List the data.
<option>:
--plugins | -p : list the loaded plugins. It is processed plugins list.

Use:
// list <option>
// l <option>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'preview': Preview the blog from distribution (folder name 'dist').
Use:
// preview
// p

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'remove': Remove the theme or plugin. Auto detect.
<option>:
--all-theme : remove all theme.
--all-plugin : remove all plugin.
--global | -g : remove [name] or all plugin from global directory.

Use:
// remove [option] [name]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'reset-config': Reset target config to default value.
Use:
// reset-config <configName>
// rc <configName>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command 'Run': Run custom command from target plugin, if [command [argument]] is null will enter to mode custom command, otherwise direct run command. Or run the global command.
<option>:
name : Name of plugin to run custom command or global option.

Use:
// run [-g|--global] <name> [command [argument]]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
